message:
fix(focus): retarget trap focus when current group member becomes unfocusable

Rename is_current_in_group → is_current_focusable_in_group and add a
can_focus() check so push_trap correctly retargets to the next focusable
member when the currently focused node in the group has been marked
unfocusable. Previously, the trap would accept the unfocusable node as
valid and leave focus stuck on an element that can't receive input.

Includes a regression test verifying retargeting behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
